description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the vesuvius/android-sdk:latest Docker image with three stages: build, test, and package. In the build stage define build_debug (runs gradle assembleDebug, excluded from sit_uat, staging, production, master), build_release (runs gradle assembleRelease, only on master and production), and build_staging (runs gradle assembleStaging, only on sit_uat and staging). In the test stage add test_debug (runs gradle testDebug, gradle lint, compares lint issue counts, moves Jacoco report, computes coverage with bc and fails if below 0, artifacts path codeCoverageReport/, excluded same branches), test_release (runs gradle lint, checks lint issues, gradle testRelease, moves report, computes coverage, only on master and production, artifacts path codeCoverageReport/), and test_staging (runs gradle testStaging, gradle lint, same checks, artifacts path codeCoverageReport/, only on sit_uat and staging). In the package stage add package_debug (exports APP_NAME, VERSION_NAME, VERSION_CODE, creates deliverables folder, writes build info, runs gradle assembleDebug, moves debug APK to deliverables with naming, artifacts deliverables expire in 48 hours, environment coba_coba, excluded same branches), package_release (same steps with gradle assembleRelease, moves release APK, artifacts deliverables, environment production, only on master and production), and package_staging (same steps with gradle assembleStaging, moves staging APK, artifacts deliverables expire in 48 hours, environment sit_uat, only on sit_uat and staging).
